---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for the game
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Problem**

What problem or frustration does this address?
e.g. "I find it hard to …", "It is unclear when …"

**Proposal**

What you would like to see added or changed.

**Alternatives considered**

Other solutions or workarounds you have thought about.

**Additional context**

Anything else: mock-ups, examples from other games, links.
